category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Costa Rica.

title.en: China-to-Costa Rica EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入哥斯达黎加：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入哥斯大黎加：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Costa Rica INTECO / ARESEP / ICE requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, Americas connector ecosystem (SAE J1772 Type 1 AC and CCS1 DC as the dominant installed base), ARESEP tariff and grid-connection rules, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与哥斯达黎加INTECO / ARESEP / ICE要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、美洲接口体系（SAE J1772 Type 1交流及CCS1直流为主流装机基础）、ARESEP电价及并网规则、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與哥斯大黎加INTECO / ARESEP / ICE要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、美洲接口體系（SAE J1772 Type 1交流及CCS1直流為主流裝機基礎）、ARESEP電價及併網規則、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Costa Rica, the confirmed practical gaps are: connector hardware redesign from GB/T 20234 to the Americas ecosystem (SAE J1772 Type 1 for AC; CCS1 for DC fast charging), since GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with vehicles sold in Costa Rica; IEC-based safety evidence (IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 for DC) accepted by INTECO and project owners, as GB/T 18487 test reports are not a direct substitute; grid adaptation to Costa Rica's 120/240 V, 60 Hz supply (versus China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz), requiring input-voltage range confirmation and frequency-sensitive derating; ARESEP regulation compliance covering tariff metering, grid-connection rules, and the Ley 9518 framework that currently restricts fast-charger installation to licensed electricity distributors (a bill to open this to private operators was under Congressional review as of early 2024); and OCPP back-office interoperability for networked chargers connecting to ICE Relectric or other operators. Costa Rica operates one of the world's cleanest grids (≈98.6% renewable in 2025, predominantly hydroelectric), making EV charging genuinely low-carbon. It also led the Americas in BEV market share in 2024 (≈15.4% of new-car sales). Exporters should confirm with INTECO / ARESEP / the specific operator the exact conformity assessment route, connector mandate, metering requirements, and Ley 9518 installation-rights status before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入哥斯达黎加时，已确认的实务差距包括：接口硬件从GB/T 20234改换为美洲体系（交流SAE J1772 Type 1，直流快充CCS1），因为GB/T接口与哥斯达黎加在售车辆在物理上不兼容；INTECO和项目业主接受的IEC安全证据（交流IEC 61851-1，直流IEC 61851-23），GB/T 18487测试报告不能直接替代；适配哥斯达黎加120/240 V、60 Hz电网（中国为220/380 V、50 Hz），需确认输入电压范围和频率敏感降额；ARESEP法规合规，包括计量电价、并网规则，以及《9518法》框架（该法目前将快充站安装权限制于持证供电商，2024年初有议案拟对私营运营商开放，正在国会审议）；以及接入ICE Relectric或其他运营商的联网充电桩的OCPP后台互操作性。哥斯达黎加拥有全球最清洁电网之一（2025年约98.6%可再生能源，以水电为主），使电动汽车充电真正实现低碳。哥斯达黎加在2024年还以约15.4%的新车销量份额领跑全美洲纯电动汽车市场。出口商在发货前应向INTECO / ARESEP及具体运营商确认合格评定路径、接口要求、计量要求，以及《9518法》安装授权现状。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入哥斯大黎加時，已確認的實務差距包括：接口硬體從GB/T 20234改換為美洲體系（交流SAE J1772 Type 1，直流快充CCS1），因為GB/T接口與哥斯大黎加在售車輛在物理上不兼容；INTECO和項目業主接受的IEC安全證據（交流IEC 61851-1，直流IEC 61851-23），GB/T 18487測試報告不能直接替代；適配哥斯大黎加120/240 V、60 Hz電網（中國為220/380 V、50 Hz），需確認輸入電壓範圍和頻率敏感降額；ARESEP法規合規，包括計量電價、併網規則，以及《9518法》框架（該法目前將快充站安裝權限制於持證供電商，2024年初有議案擬對私營運營商開放，正在國會審議）；以及接入ICE Relectric或其他運營商的聯網充電樁的OCPP後台互操作性。哥斯大黎加擁有全球最清潔電網之一（2025年約98.6%可再生能源，以水電為主），使電動汽車充電真正實現低碳。哥斯大黎加在2024年還以約15.4%的新車銷量份額領跑全美洲純電動汽車市場。出口商在發貨前應向INTECO / ARESEP及具體運營商確認合格評定路徑、接口要求、計量要求，以及《9518法》安裝授權現狀。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INTECO scope determination, ARESEP approval, Ley 9518 legal interpretation, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Costa Rica conformity assessment rules, ARESEP tariff and grid-connection requirements, INTECO standard editions, Ley 9518 installation rights, and IEC standard editions with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INTECO适用范围裁定、ARESEP批准、《9518法》法律解释、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行哥斯达黎加合格评定规则、ARESEP电价及并网要求、INTECO标准版本、《9518法》安装授权，以及IEC标准版本。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INTECO適用範圍裁定、ARESEP批准、《9518法》法律解釋、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行哥斯大黎加合格評定規則、ARESEP電價及併網要求、INTECO標準版本、《9518法》安裝授權，以及IEC標準版本。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
